description_long: This is a rectangular, low-profile wooden shelf unit with an open front and back, designed for easy access and visibility of its contents. The shelf sits on four caster wheels, allowing it to be easily moved across flat surfaces. The top and bottom surfaces are flat, with a single horizontal divider creating two open compartments. Several books are scattered on the top and inside the lower compartment, suggesting its use for storage or display. The wood has a light, natural finish, and the overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for urban environments such as libraries, offices, or public waiting areas. The visible wheels and open structure make it ideal for flexible, mobile storage needs.
description: A light wood, rectangular open shelf unit on caster wheels, with books placed on and inside it. Its minimalist design and mobility make it suitable for urban public or office spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open shelf with books inside and on top, and all four wheels visible.
description_view_1: Side view showing the depth of the shelf, two books on top, and two wheels at the base.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with books visible inside and on top, and all four wheels in view.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with books on top, showing the shelf's depth and two wheels.
